vocabulary.example: I want to improve every day.
My goal is to help people grow.

phrases.en: It depends on the business requirements.
My goal is to help developers grow.
Even experienced developers can be wrong sometimes.

grammarFixes.wrong: I work with Node.js for 8 years.
grammarFixes.right: I've worked with Node.js for 8 years.

teamLeadSentences.en: My goal is not to prove that I'm right. My goal is to find the best solution.
teamLeadSentences.ru: Моя цель — не доказать, что я прав. Моя цель — найти лучшее решение.

teamLeadSentences.en: Sometimes the best solution combines ideas from both developers.
teamLeadSentences.ru: Иногда лучшее решение объединяет идеи обоих разработчиков.

teamLeadSentences.en: I always try to understand the other person's point of view.
teamLeadSentences.ru: Я всегда стараюсь понять точку зрения другого человека.

teamLeadSentences.en: Good communication is just as important as good code.
teamLeadSentences.ru: Хорошая коммуникация так же важна, как хороший код.

teamLeadSentences.en: I always focus on solving the problem, not blaming people.
teamLeadSentences.ru: Я всегда сосредоточен на решении проблемы, а не на поиске виноватых.

dailyGoal.en: In my experience, this approach works well.
The most important thing is to stay calm.
It depends on the business requirements.
My goal is to help developers grow.
